pulse: The financial sector currently trades at a median EV/EBITDA of 7.9x and a P/E ratio of 14.9x, closely aligned with broader market valuations. In light of recent earnings previews indicating positive momentum, JPM (trailing P/E of 14.9x) and BAC (trailing P/E of 13.2x) may benefit from the anticipated results supporting the ongoing rally, as highlighted in Charles Schwab's commentary on Q4 results. Looking ahead, the shift towards precision in banking, as noted in McKinsey's annual review, suggests that investors should focus on financial institutions demonstrating operational efficiency and sustainable growth to navigate potential market fluctuations following recent rate cuts.
